FEYTWISTED Armor

carries warmth despite the thin cloth material. Some part of its contruction
brings memories of industry, of silt and rain and the bustle of civilization.
It smells of ozone and smoke and broken dreams. Was this made by a Sharn artificer,
someone you've met on your travels? Or is this a memory of travels yet to come?

name: Orcish Privateer's Plate
description:
Though the actual origin of this armor is unknown, it is obvious why the orcish
pirate Captain Dustdyn claimed it as his own. Not only is it made of lightweight
mithral, but the joints of this armor have been fitted in a novel way that
allows for a flexibility and freedom of movement unparallelled in most plate
armors. An important consideration when trying to move about on the deck of
a ship, to be sure. Captain Dustdyn seems to have 'improved' this armor further
